description:
<WordWrap>*A fist that normaly comes as a toy at the place I work.
Suprisingly dangerous.
name: Silly Fist

description:
<WordWrap>*The icon makes it look a goofy for police to be using this. 
But its better than a toy fist.
name: Police Baton

description:
<WordWrap>*Short for "Electric Saw", this is a toned down chainsaw.
It was torn off a robot in storage.
name: E-Saw

description:
<WordWrap>"Seemingly just a headband, but it has a chance to 
keep me [Agislash] alive from a fatal blow."
name: Oneshot Band

description:
<WordWrap>"A vial of sweat from an unnamed robot? Yuck. Though 
when equiped it boosts the power of my [Agislash's] Metal Claw."
name: Mech Sweat

description:
*A bat covered in shard of an unknown material.
It resonates with damage!
name: Shardbearer Bat

description:
<WordWrap>"A replacement cloth? How does that work? It increaces
my [Agislash's] defence."
name: Eternal Cloth
